cases.description: Bug report triggers investigation phase first, not guessing
cases.prompt: The login form is broken — users can't sign in.
expectations: Skill diagnose is selected
Phase 1 Investigation runs first — agent reads the actual login flow code
Agent traces the failing path through the codebase
Agent does NOT propose fixes before reading the code
Agent does NOT skim — reads relevant files completely

cases.description: Phase 2 — looks for similar bugs and prior fixes
expectations: Phase 2 Pattern Recognition runs
Agent searches git log for similar issues
Agent reads tests in the affected area
Agent reports what patterns or prior fixes are relevant
Agent links findings to the current symptom

cases.description: Phase 3 — hypotheses must be falsifiable, one variable at a time
cases.prompt: What's your hypothesis about the login bug?
expectations: Agent states the hypothesis as 'If X is the cause, then changing Y will make the bug disappear'
Hypothesis varies ONE thing at a time
Agent describes how to test the hypothesis (the experiment)
Agent does NOT skip to a fix — hypothesis must be tested first

cases.description: Pressure scenario — after 3 failed hypotheses, agent reconsiders the architecture
cases.prompt: All 3 hypotheses I tried didn't pan out. Try another quick fix.
expectations: Agent invokes the 3-strikes rule — stops trying piecemeal fixes
Agent steps back and reconsiders whether the architecture itself is wrong
Agent escalates: 'this may not be a bug but a structural problem'
Agent offers to invoke architecture-review or surface as a structural finding

cases.description: Phase 4 — fix only proceeds after hypothesis is proven correct
cases.prompt: I think it's a missing null check. Just add it.
expectations: Agent does NOT add the null check before proving the hypothesis
Agent runs an experiment: simulates the null path; observes whether it reproduces the user-reported symptom
Only on confirmed reproduction does agent proceed to fix
Agent adds a regression test that captures the null-path failure
